TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed beforefieldinit XslTransform extends System.Object

Attribute.AttributeName: [System.Obsolete("This class has been deprecated. Please use System.Xml.Xsl.XslCompiledTransform instead. http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=14202")]
[<System.Obsolete("This class has been deprecated. Please use System.Xml.Xsl.XslCompiledTransform instead. http://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=14202")>]

Docs.summary: Transforms XML data using an Extensible Stylesheet Language for Transformations (XSLT) style sheet.
Docs.threadsafe: objects are only thread-safe for transform operations. Other operations are not guaranteed to be thread-safe. You must ensure that no other methods are called on the object during load operations.

MemberSignature.Value: public XslTransform ();
.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor() cil managed
Public Sub New ()
public: XslTransform();

Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
Loads the XSLT style sheet, including style sheets referenced in and elements.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Load (string url);
.method public hidebysig instance void Load(string url) cil managed
Public Sub Load (url As String)
member this.Load : string -> unit
public: void Load(System::String ^ url);

Docs.param: The URL that specifies the XSLT style sheet to load.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet specified by a URL.
Docs.exception: The loaded resource is not a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded script, and the caller does not have permission.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Load (System.Xml.XmlReader stylesheet);
.method public hidebysig instance void Load(class System.Xml.XmlReader stylesheet) cil managed
Public Sub Load (stylesheet As XmlReader)
member this.Load : System.Xml.XmlReader -> unit
public: void Load(System::Xml::XmlReader ^ stylesheet);

Docs.param: An object that contains the XSLT style sheet.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet contained in the .
Docs.exception: The current node does not conform to a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded scripts, and the caller does not have permission.

.method public hidebysig instance void Load(class System.Xml.XPath.IXPathNavigable stylesheet) cil managed

member this.Load : System.Xml.XPath.IXPathNavigable -> unit

Docs.param: An object implementing the interface. In .NET, this can be either an (typically an ), or an containing the XSLT style sheet.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet contained in the .
Docs.exception: The loaded resource is not a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded scripts, and the caller does not have permission.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Load (System.Xml.XPath.XPathNavigator stylesheet);
.method public hidebysig instance void Load(class System.Xml.XPath.XPathNavigator stylesheet) cil managed
Public Sub Load (stylesheet As XPathNavigator)
member this.Load : System.Xml.XPath.XPathNavigator -> unit
public: void Load(System::Xml::XPath::XPathNavigator ^ stylesheet);

Docs.param: An object that contains the XSLT style sheet.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet contained in the .
Docs.exception: The current node does not conform to a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded scripts, and the caller does not have permission.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Load (string url, System.Xml.XmlResolver? resolver);
.method public hidebysig instance void Load(string url, class System.Xml.XmlResolver resolver) cil managed
Public Sub Load (url As String, resolver As XmlResolver)
member this.Load : string * System.Xml.XmlResolver -> unit
public: void Load(System::String ^ url, System::Xml::XmlResolver ^ resolver);
public void Load (string url, System.Xml.XmlResolver resolver);

Docs.param: The URL that specifies the XSLT style sheet to load.

The to use to load the style sheet and any style sheet(s) referenced in xsl:import and xsl:include elements.
If this is , a default with no user credentials is used to open the style sheet. The default is not used to resolve any external resources in the style sheet, so xsl:import and xsl:include elements are not resolved.
The is not cached after the method completes.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet specified by a URL.
Docs.exception: The loaded resource is not a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded script, and the caller does not have permission.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Load (System.Xml.XmlReader stylesheet, System.Xml.XmlResolver? resolver);
.method public hidebysig instance void Load(class System.Xml.XmlReader stylesheet, class System.Xml.XmlResolver resolver) cil managed
Public Sub Load (stylesheet As XmlReader, resolver As XmlResolver)
member this.Load : System.Xml.XmlReader * System.Xml.XmlResolver -> unit
public: void Load(System::Xml::XmlReader ^ stylesheet, System::Xml::XmlResolver ^ resolver);
public void Load (System.Xml.XmlReader stylesheet, System.Xml.XmlResolver resolver);

Docs.param: An object that contains the XSLT style sheet.

The used to load any style sheets referenced in xsl:import and xsl:include elements. If this is , external resources are not resolved.
The is not cached after the method completes.
Docs.summary: Loads the XSLT style sheet contained in the .
Docs.exception: The current node does not conform to a valid style sheet.
The style sheet contains embedded scripts, and the caller does not have permission.

The is not cached after the method completes.

Docs.exception: The loaded resource is not a valid style sheet.

Docs.exception: The current node does not conform to a valid style sheet.

Docs.summary: Transforms the XML data using the loaded XSLT style sheet.

MemberSignature.Value: public void Transform (string inputfile, string outputfile);
.method public hidebysig instance void Transform(string inputfile, string outputfile) cil managed
Public Sub Transform (inputfile As String, outputfile As String)
member this.Transform : string * string -> unit
public: void Transform(System::String ^ inputfile, System::String ^ outputfile);

Docs.param: The URL of the source document to be transformed.
The URL of the output file.
Docs.summary: Transforms the XML data in the input file and outputs the result to an output file.

Docs.param: An object implementing the interface. In .NET, this can be either an (typically an ), or an containing the data to be transformed.
An containing the namespace-qualified arguments used as input to the transformation.
Docs.summary: Transforms the XML data in the using the specified and outputs the result to an .
Docs.returns: An containing the results of the transformation.

Docs.param: The URL of the source document to be transformed.
The URL of the output file.

The used to resolve the XSLT document() function. If this is , the document() function is not resolved.
The is not cached after the method completes.
Docs.summary: Transforms the XML data in the input file and outputs the result to an output file.

An containing the namespace-qualified arguments used as input to the transformation.
The to which you want to output.

The used to resolve the XSLT document() function. If this is , the document() function is not resolved.
The is not cached after the method completes.
Docs.summary: Transforms the XML data in the using the specified and outputs the result to a .
Docs.exception: There was an error processing the XSLT transformation..
